text.title: test-consumer-contract-from-spec Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for test-consumer-contract-from-spec as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Allowing humans to "tweak" generated Pact JSON in the same commit that regenerates it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Once the generated file is editable, the regen step becomes optional and the contract drifts the same way hand-written ones do.

failure-mode.description: Running can-i-deploy only on the consumer side and not the provider release.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Consumer-side checks block consumer deploys; provider-side checks block production breakage. Both are needed; provider-side is non-negotiable.
